name: Rock Candy on a String
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve 5 cups of sugar in 2 cups of water.
2. Cook the mixture until it reaches a temperature of 250°F (hard ball stage).
3. Do not stir after dissolving the sugar.
4. Pour the hot liquid into a pie pan with a string suspended across the top, ensuring the string does not touch the bottom of the pan.
5. Cover the pan with tin foil and leave undisturbed for one week.
6. After 7 days, carefully remove the string or stick; it will be covered in sugar crystals.
